subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! Hearken unto the call of the Lord of Names, Who summoneth thee from the Prison of 'Akká with a voice that doth enrapture [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رضا ان استمع ندآء مالک الاسماء انه یدعوک فی سجن عکاء بندآء انجذب منه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God
